textByHashes.5c5949d43290dfd08f647a352c7a10b2d4e3a2c3: What is it, human? Speak and begone, your presence disgusts me!
textByHashes.4a6ac22982ab5798f32f41fc491a8315bf2b24a6: Stop your muttering and get to the point!
textByHashes.eca36a2418f704ffd279c77af60281f13e674203: I am the Voice of Yama.
textByHashes.2a1b5f3d4df4ae5d06bc88985e3adf59d328b574: Yama is my master, a powerful demon of fire.
textByHashes.4d1411888fc27d78de88e63d21668d2fd2bf17e9: Currently my master resides below us, building strength. Worry not, human, my master will eventually own your soul too.
textByHashes.ce2bac0592134ed3dea6232d0d57454edefb302e: Disgusting. My master, the great demon Yama, wishes to speak with you.
textByHashes.081447d60f5b98969dfc33dab0aad22a1c977870: My master wishes to have the satisfaction of explaining that to you himself. For this, I envy him. I will make do with the idiotic expression you wear presently.
textByHashes.b8ea857f511e661a917c5c7863949ccd02a74c76: Silence, human! You will make no demands of me. Proceed to my master's domain and speak with him yourself if you desire an answer.
textByHashes.09a6b94b162155b87d45a529e7e854ca4f2bb0f3: Proceed or begone, human. I will not bear your foul presence any longer than is necessary.
textByHashes.1100691789b86a546af44a42668b97ad836adc25: You may not go where you please without my master's blessing, human. Step back.
